basic_details.job_title: ANU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Stenographer, Peon and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Acharya Nagarjuna University (ANU) Stenographer, Peon and More Notification 2026 has been released on 15 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the ANU Stenographer, Peon and More Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Social Sciences with 10 research publications and 10 years experience (Professor), Master's degree with 55% marks in Social Sciences and NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. (Research Officer), Degree with Type Writing and Shorthand Higher Grade and DCA (Stenographer), VII Class (Peon)
qualification.details: Professor: Ph.D. in Social Sciences with 10 research publications, 10 years teaching/research experience or outstanding professional with Ph.D. and 10 years experience. Research on Babu Jagjivan Ram/Dalit Studies desirable. Research Officer: Master's degree with 55% marks in Social Sciences, NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC regulations. Stenographer (Grade 'C'): Degree of a University and pass in Type Writing and Shorthand Higher Grade with DCA from a Government recognized institution. Telugu Type Writing/Computer training preferred. Peon: VII Class

selection_process: Shortlisting based on Academic Score Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ANU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.acharya_nagarjuna_university_anu: Ph.D. in Social Sciences with 10 research publications and 10 years experience (Professor), Master's degree with 55% marks in Social Sciences and NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. (Research Officer), Degree with Type Writing and Shorthand Higher Grade and DCA (Stenographer), VII Class (Peon)

content_sections.heading: ANU Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ANU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ANU Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Professor: Ph.D. in Social Sciences with 10 research publications, 10 years teaching/research experience or outstanding professional with Ph.D. and 10 years experience. Research on Babu Jagjivan Ram/Dalit Studies desirable. Research Officer: Master's degree with 55% marks in Social Sciences, NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC regulations. Stenographer (Grade 'C'): Degree of a University and pass in Type Writing and Shorthand Higher Grade with DCA from a Government recognized institution. Telugu Type Writing/Computer training preferred. Peon: VII Class

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on Academic Score Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ANU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ANU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Acharya Nagarjuna University recruitment is 02-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the university before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in ANU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Acharya Nagarjuna University is recruiting for a total of 4 posts, including Professor, Research Officer, Stenographer, and Peon.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for ANU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for the Peon post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Peon post is VII Class. This is a basic educational requirement for this position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Professor post at ANU?
faq.answer: The Professor post at Acharya Nagarjuna University offers a salary in the range of ₹37400-67000 with a Grade Pay of ₹10000/-.

faq.question: Q6. Are there any age relaxations for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Age relaxation details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided summary. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for specific age relaxation rules.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for ANU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their academic scores, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application fee for the Stenographer post?
faq.answer: The application fee for the Stenographer post is ₹1000/- for General/OBC candidates and ₹500/- for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the educational qualification for the Research Officer post?
faq.answer: A Master's degree with 55% marks in Social Sciences, along with NET/SLET/SET or a Ph.D. as per UGC regulations, is required for the Research Officer position.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF for ANU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.
